title: Fangs Enchantment
description: A fun enchantment that allows you to summon fangs (with a cooldown) when you right-click a sword! Cool down is 5 seconds
body: The Fangs Enchantment mod for Minecraft, created by PereFalconer, adds a custom enchantment that allows players to summon Evoker fangs by right-clicking with an enchanted sword or axe. The enchantment can reach up to level 4, with each level summoning more fangs in a straight line—one at level 1, two at level 2, and so on. To maintain balance, the ability has a 5-second cooldown between uses. It offers a fun and tactical new way to deal damage and control space in combat. The mod is compatible with Minecraft version 1.21.5. This mod was made for a friend after I broke his armour... Oops!
